error_string: Nested Blueprint url_prefix is ignored during registration

required_files.rationale: Contains Blueprint.register_blueprint and the register method that handles URL prefix merging for nested blueprints
Base class Scaffold defines the url_prefix property and _merge_blueprint_params helper

sufficient_files.rationale: Flask app class that initiates the top-level blueprint registration

error_chain: Blueprint.register() is called with the nested blueprint
URL prefix from nested blueprint is merged in blueprints.py
If url_prefix passed to register_blueprint is None, nested bp prefix may be dropped
trigger_conditions: Nested blueprint has url_prefix set at construction time
Parent blueprint calls register_blueprint without explicit url_prefix override
The prefix merging logic in register() does not correctly concatenate prefixes
